summary: P1.8-6 unified approval gate + execution routing: OperationsPipelineShell with Shop Health hero, Clarity Cards, approval toolbar; approve-all/selective/reject-with-reason; routes NPL to ListingWorkflowPanel, Refund Spike to LeakageWorkflowPanel, deferred workflows to no-op toast. Reuses TaskDismissModal and useTaskExecutor.

interfaceChanges.description: Unified approval gate state: selective, bulk, reject-with-reason, executor routing.
Maps validated workflow_id to listing, leakage, or noop execution.

mappings.criterion: Operations shell with health hero Clarity Cards and approval gate
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_approval_gate.test.tsx::renders shop health hero and ranked clarity cards for NEW_SHOP

mappings.criterion: Approve-all and selective approve update session state
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_approval_gate.test.tsx::approve selected updates only chosen workflow records

mappings.criterion: NEW_SHOP approve NPL opens listing modal E2E
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_approval_gate.test.tsx::approve npl opens listing modal and completes happy path stub

mappings.criterion: MID_LARGE_SHOP approve Refund Spike opens leakage modal
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_approval_gate.test.tsx::approve refund_spike_detection opens leakage modal for return_spike task

mappings.criterion: Deferred workflow approve shows no-op toast without modal
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_approval_gate.test.tsx::approve minimize_violations shows no-op toast without modal

mappings.criterion: Workflow routing maps npl to list_products executable task
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_approval_routing.test.ts::maps npl to list_products task for NEW_SHOP persona
